name: tauri-apple-release
description: Standardize, debug, and execute Tauri iOS TestFlight and macOS Apple release pipelines: App Store Connect upload auth, Distribution signing, provisioning profiles, and notarization.

interface.shortDescription: Standardize, debug, and execute Tauri iOS TestFlight and macOS Apple release pipelines: App Store Connect upload auth, Distribution signing, provisioning profiles, and notarization.
interface.longDescription: Triage which release gate failed, gather one complete credential packet, and validate signing and export before uploading to TestFlight or notarizing for macOS.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Tauri Apple Release safely.
